sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70421" key="neotribh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-τρῐβής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n70421.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">freshly ground,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πυροῖο ἄχθος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:167" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">167</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n70421.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">freshly extracted,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl></cit>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
